title: What It Actually Looks Like to Lead First and Want Nothing Back
caption:
Everybody wants to lead when the room is watching.

The real test is whether you'll go first when nobody's counting: the job nobody wants, the cost before the credit, the relationship with zero upside.

Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men. (Colossians 3:23)

Here's what that actually looks like this week.

#faith #christianmen #leadership #discipline #manofgod #godlymen
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
